note: All numbers from the real frozen-AVES2 DCLDE artifact; only the negative-control inputs are explicitly synthetic.

interpretation.attribution: The within-site ecotype signal is multi-dimensional and redundantly distributed across the AVES2 representation: a single dimension is near chance, ablating the top-k individually-important dimensions does not collapse the decode (the remaining dimensions compensate), and a low-rank PCA projection already recovers most of it. The signal is distributed structure, not a single-channel artifact.
interpretation.controls: Structure-matched Gaussian noise and per-dimension feature shuffle both fall to chance, and the observed decode sits above the label-permutation null, so the probe is using joint structure in the representation rather than a marginal artifact or a leak.

caveats: Attribution is computed on the within-provider (site-held-constant) ecotype decode, so it characterises the biological signal isolated by H4, not the site-confounded pooled number.
Permutation importance and knock-out use a single stratified 70/30 split for tractability; the 5-fold balanced accuracy is reported as the observed effect.
This dissects WHERE the signal lives in the representation; it is not a claim about meaning or function.
